itemDisplayName: Deploy a Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 VM with Trusted Launch
description: Deploys a RHEL 9 Gen2 virtual machine with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard static public IP, SSH key or password authentication, and configurable VM size. Uses Red Hat's PAYG image — no separate Red Hat subscription required.
summary: RHEL 9 Gen2 VM with Trusted Launch, Standard IP, and SSH key auth.
